# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description | strip_newlines | strip }}

Author: {{ site.author }} — backend engineer writing senior-level deep dives on Java,
Spring Boot, Apache Kafka, PostgreSQL, and distributed-systems patterns. Articles are
hands-on, production-focused, and built around real working code.
